driver.note: This tracker began as a pre-implementation ledger and now records completed Phase 0/1/2 execution plus the next planned frontend milestone.

verification.test_command: npm --prefix frontend test && npm --prefix frontend run build
verification.test_result: frontend tests: 25 passed; frontend build: success; TypeScript LSP diagnostics: clean

criteria: app shell and route structure are implemented
bearer token input and protected request handling work
structured error parser is shared across routes
foundation test harness and route-entry fixtures exist
plan form submission works end to end
validation and policy recovery for 409, 422, 401, and 403 are covered
run detail renders semantic plan sections
run detail supports direct-entry and refresh from GET /v1/workflows/{run_id}
degraded success and hard errors are clearly distinguished
raw payload and metadata inspectability are included in the release gate
review form and result rendering work end to end
test-plan prefill and manual entry both work
review and test-plan run detail preserve shared inspectability surfaces
shared Phase 2 release-gate tests are present

issues.title: App Shell and Route Foundation
issues.notes: Frontend workspace now ships a shared shell, top bar, nav, and direct-entry route scaffolds under `frontend/src`.

subtasks.title: Add app shell layout with top bar and navigation
Register /workflows/new, /runs/:runId, /runs/:runId/trace, /health routes
Support direct-entry route shell rendering

issues.title: Typed API Client and Structured Error Normalization
issues.notes: Typed TS mirrors and a shared fetch/error layer now cover health, workflow, trace, and feedback clients.

subtasks.title: Create typed workflow, run, trace, feedback, and health client functions
Normalize structured API errors into shared client shape
Share error parsing between health and protected endpoints

issues.title: Session Bearer Token Handling
issues.notes: SessionProvider and token dialog persist bearer token and request language in sessionStorage only.

subtasks.title: Add token input and edit/reset UI
Inject Authorization header for protected requests
Provide 401 recovery flow without long-lived insecure storage

issues.title: Shared Screen State Primitives and Global Status UX
issues.notes: Shared loading, empty, error, and degraded banners are integrated into health and protected route shells.

subtasks.title: Create shared loading and empty-state primitives
Create shared API error and request_id display banner
Create degraded-success warning treatment distinct from hard failure

issues.title: Frontend Test Harness and Contract Fixtures
issues.notes: Vitest + RTL + MSW harness now verifies route direct-entry, token state, health, run, and trace shells.

subtasks.title: Set up route/component/integration test harness
Add mocked backend contract fixtures
Add direct-entry route test utilities and smoke suite

issues.title: Plan Workflow Form Happy Path
issues.notes: `/workflows/new` now submits real plan requests with optional artifacts/options and transitions to run detail on success.

subtasks.title: Build plan form core fields for repo_id, branch, and task_text
Add optional artifact and request option inputs
Submit plan request and transition to run detail on success

issues.title: Plan Validation and Policy Error Recovery
issues.notes: Plan form now keeps draft state through 409/422/401/403 responses and surfaces request IDs and recovery copy.

subtasks.title: Add 409 approval conflict guidance and recovery
Add 422 field-level validation rendering
Add 401/403 recovery and request_id visibility without clearing input

issues.title: Run Detail Route and Nested Result Mapping
issues.notes: Run detail now rebuilds from GET payloads, adapts nested result data, and stays direct-entry safe.

subtasks.title: Fetch run detail from /runs/:runId route
Map top-level metadata and nested RunDetailResponse.result together
Support refresh and direct-entry restoration from fetched payload alone

issues.title: Plan Result Rendering and Evidence Inspection
issues.notes: Run detail now renders overview, semantic plan sections, evidence cards, and metadata instead of only raw JSON.

subtasks.title: Render overview with status, confidence, intents, and agents
Render semantic plan sections for summary, impacted_areas, implementation_plan, tests, risks, and open_questions
Render evidence cards and empty evidence state

issues.title: Degraded Success and Structured Error UX
issues.notes: Degraded success, protected-route recovery, and distinct 401/403/404 treatments are exercised in route tests.

subtasks.title: Show degraded banner when warnings and reduced confidence are present
Differentiate 403, 404, and 401 states on run detail
Add 401 token recovery for direct-entry and refresh on protected run route

issues.title: Raw Payload and Metadata Inspection Hardening
issues.notes: Raw payload drawer and extended metadata panel are now part of the run-detail experience and release gate.

subtasks.title: Add raw request/result payload drawer
Expose run_id, trace_id, model_version, skill_versions, prompt_versions, user_id, and repo_scope
Add component tests for payload drawer and metadata visibility

issues.title: Phase 1 Golden Path and Release Verification
issues.notes: Route and integration tests now cover submit happy path, direct entry, degraded mode, auth/policy errors, and inspectability; release checklist is documented.

subtasks.title: Verify plan submit to run-detail golden path
Verify direct-entry and refresh restoration from GET /v1/workflows/{run_id}
Verify degraded success, 401 recovery, and inspectability release gate

issues.title: Review Workflow Form and Validation
issues.notes: `/workflows/new?mode=review` now validates context and submits review requests without regressing the plan flow.

subtasks.title: Add mode-aware review form UI and diff_text input
Block review submit unless diff_text, changed_files, or pr_url is present
Submit review request and preserve auth/policy error recovery

issues.title: Review Result Rendering
issues.notes: Run detail now branches into review-specific rendering with verdict, findings, evidence, and degraded-state treatment.

subtasks.title: Detect review-shaped run detail payloads
Render review findings, missing tests, risks, and readiness verdict
Keep evidence, metadata, raw payloads, and degraded banner available for review runs

issues.title: Test-Plan Form, Prefill, and Result Rendering
issues.notes: Test-plan mode now supports manual entry plus memory-only prefill from a plan result and renders the returned test-plan sections in run detail.

subtasks.title: Add test-plan mode form using only backend-supported fields
Prefill implementation_plan and impacted_areas from plan run detail navigation state
Render unit, integration, regression, edge-case, and execution-order sections for test-plan runs

issues.title: Phase 2 Shared Release Gate and Repo Hygiene
issues.notes: Phase 2 adds shared release-gate tests, a release checklist, tracker updates, and frontend-specific ignore entries.

subtasks.title: Add shared release-gate tests for plan regression, review flow, and test-plan prefill
Document the Phase 2 release checklist
Ignore frontend-generated artifacts in .gitignore

loop.summary: Analyze backend-supported frontend surface and define operator-console scope
Split frontend scope into IA, wireframe, component, and implementation-plan detail
Create Ralph-oriented frontend PRD with phases, user stories, and acceptance criteria
Decompose frontend Phase 0/1 into executable issue backlog
Create pre-implementation frontend progress ledger in prd.json style
Implement frontend Phase 0 shell, typed client foundation, session token handling, and tests
Implement frontend Phase 1 plan flow, semantic run detail, inspectability, and release gate
Close Phase 1 release evidence gaps with explicit 403/404 and inspectability tests
Implement frontend Phase 2 review/test-plan flows, shared release gate, and repo hygiene

next_focus: Phase 3 / Trace route: replace raw trace payload scaffold with timeline and tool-call rendering
Phase 3 / Health polish: evolve connector health cards and copy without regressing existing health route coverage
Phase 3 / Feedback: add inline run-detail feedback submission with success and repeat-submit guard
Phase 3 / Shared release gate: extend direct-entry and degraded-state coverage across trace, health, and feedback flows
